blocks.content: I am currently exploring octree computation for 3D nesting inside vehicle trunks, Hilbert space-filling curves for spatial ordering, BLDC motor control, Field-Oriented Control, PMSM structural design, power distribution modeling in robotics, LTSpice-style battery and servo reasoning, learning-based surface modeling, AI agent systems for engineering reasoning, local LLM integration inside CAD workflows, reinforcement learning for quadruped locomotion, and web-based LLM identity modeling.

My long-term research interests include intelligent mechanical systems that reason physically, control-driven autonomy, optimization inside CAD systems, learning-enhanced geometry processing, physics-informed machine learning, digital twins beyond visualization, bridging computational geometry with control theory, and motor design beyond black-box ESC usage.

I am excited by deriving Jacobians by hand, watching unstable systems stabilize under control, designing motors from electromagnetic fundamentals, building hardware that matches simulation, writing modular code, system-level integration, constrained optimization, and long-term technical depth.
